allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/remitos?date_from=2026-05-19&date_to=2026-05-21" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 12; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Rango: $\($j.dateFrom\) a $\($j.dateTo\)  Pedidos: $\($j.totalPedidos\)  Servicios: $\($j.totalServicios\)  Lineas: $\($j.lineas.Count\)"; $j.providers | Format-Table provider_name, lineCount -AutoSize | Out-String } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/remitos?date_from=2026-05-19&date_to=2026-05-21&group=service" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 12; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Servicios: $\($j.servicios.Count\)  Pedidos: $\($j.totalPedidos\)"; $j.servicios | ForEach-Object { "  - $\($_.service_name\)  [$\($_.lineas.Count\) insumos]  sup: $\($_.supervisor_surname\), $\($_.supervisor_name\)" } } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(npx eslint src/components/RemitosView.jsx 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 25; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/compras/remitos" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "PAGE: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(git commit -m "fix: agregar opcion Operaciones al selector de rol en alta de usuarios")

PowerShell(node -e "const { createClient } = require\('@supabase/supabase-js'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\({ path: '.env.local' }\); const sb = createClient\(process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, { auth: { autoRefreshToken: false, persistSession: false } }\); \(async \(\) => { const sql = `SELECT pg_get_constraintdef\(oid\) AS def FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'app_users_role_check';`; const { data, error } = await sb.rpc\('exec_sql', { sql }\); console.log\('rpc result:', JSON.stringify\({ data, error }, null, 2\)\); }\)\(\);")

PowerShell(git add src/app/mi-panel-tecnico/ src/middleware.js src/components/MainLayout.jsx src/app/login/page.js src/app/api/auth/quick-access/route.js "src/app/api/app-users/[id]/route.js" src/app/api/app-users/route.js src/app/usuarios/page.js)
